name: for_toc
description: Table of Contents plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO, free & open-source)

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_toc/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_toc/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_toc/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_toc/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
